SIGCOMM 2024 Accepted Papers

--- PAPER --- Title: Integrated Two-way Radar Backscatter Communication and Sensing with Low-power IoT Tags Authors: Ryu Okubo, Luke Jacobs, Jinhua Wang, Steven Bowers, and Elahe Soltanaghai Abstract: This paper introduces BiScatter, an integrated radar backscatter communication and sensing system. DOI: 10.1145/3651890.3672226
--- PAPER --- Title: Dissecting Carrier Aggregation in 5G Networks: Measurement, QoE Implications and Prediction Authors: Wei Ye, Xinyue Hu, Steven Sleder, Anlan Zhang, Eman Ramadan, Feng Qian, and Zhi-Li Zhang Abstract: We collect 5G carrier aggregation measurements including RSRP, RSRQ, SINR, and throughput. DOI: 10.1145/3651890.3672250
